Matching
3 ?07 1100110010 5

Constant
3 C 3 1111111111 a mismatch
3 C 3n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
3 I 0 0010000101 3 mismatch
3 I 0n 1101111010 7 mismatch

Unary 7
3 I 7 1110110111 8 mismatch
3 I 7n 0001001000 2 mismatch

Binary 07
3 AND 07 0010000101 3 mismatch
3 AND 07n 1101111010 7 mismatch
3 OR 07 1110110111 8 mismatch
3 OR 07n 0001001000 2 mismatch
3 XOR 07 1100110010 5 match 1/1
all match XOR 07
3 XOR 07n 0011001101 5 mismatch
3 AND-NOT 07 0000000000 a mismatch
3 AND-NOT 07n 1111111111 a mismatch
3 OR-NOT 07 0011001101 5 mismatch
3 OR-NOT 07n 1100110010 5 match

Matched
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 I 6
3 XOR 07
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Extending defaults
3 1100110010 5
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 1110110111 partial 1101111010 7
left 7
Starting at I 1 decreasing
I 0 0010000101 partial 0001001000 2
right 2
Choosing left
3 I 7

Selected
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 I 6
3 XOR 07
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 01110110
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 4 = 0
1 I 5 = 1
2 I 6 = 1
3 XOR 07 = XOR(I 0,I 7) = XOR(0,0) = 0
4 I 1 = 1
5 I 2 = 1
6 I 3 = 1
7 I 4 = 0

\boxed{01101110}
